Home.badge: Practice as close to the real exam format as possible
Home.heroTitle: Prepare for the driver's theory exam
Home.heroDescription: Choose a category and topics, practice with tickets, take a quick test, and track your progress. Everything in one place — simply.
Home.mockQuestionText: What should the driver do in this situation?
Home.featuresSubtitle: Simple UI, exam logic, and quick progress tracking.
Home.feat1Text: Work in real format: questions, answers, explanations.
Home.feat2Text: Choose only the topics you need and practice accordingly.
Home.feat3Text: Random 30 questions and results — just like the exam.
Home.feat4Text: See your strong/weak topics and improve your score.
Home.howSubtitle: 3 steps to go to the exam with confidence.
Home.step1Text: B, A, C, D, and more.
Home.step2Text: Select what you want from 32 topics.
Home.step3Text: Get results and repeat weak sections.
Home.recommendationText: Start by choosing topics, then move to tickets. Finally — a quick test 1-2 times daily.
Home.categoriesSubtitle: Choose a category and start practicing.
Home.faq1Q: Can I practice only specific topics?
Home.faq1A: Yes. Use topic selection to mark only the subjects you need, and tests/tickets will be based on them.
Home.faq2Q: How many questions does the quick test contain?
Home.faq2A: By default, 30 random questions. You can also add size control in your logic.
Home.faq3A: You can add authentication or local storage (localStorage) and a progress page.
Home.faq4Q: Does it work well on mobile?
Home.faq4A: Yes — this design is built responsive from the start.
Home.ctaText: 10 minutes a day — and you'll see results soon.

Exam.examPassed: You successfully passed the driving license theory exam
